import { spec, specId } from "@libar-dev/software-delivery-protocol";

// The unterminated template literal below is the parse break: an error-tolerant parse would
// swallow the second carrier into the first one's section prose, so the whole file must fail
// loudly instead of reifying anything (ambiguity is loud, L2).
export const swallowingSpec = spec({
  id: specId("spec:orders.parse-broken"),
  title: "Carrier whose section prose never terminates",
  kind: "behavior",
  altitude: "story",
  readiness: "idea",
  intent: { outcome: `unterminated
});

export const swallowedSpec = spec({
  id: specId("spec:orders.swallowed"),
  title: "Carrier the recovered AST would silently absorb",
  kind: "behavior",
  altitude: "story",
  readiness: "idea",
});
